displayTitle: Legends Epic Collection: The New Republic Vol. 1
synopsis: Collects Star Wars: Mara Jade (1998) #0 (web comic) & 1-6 (“By The Emperor’s Hand”), Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire – Evolution #1-5 (Note that this occurs between Rogue Squadron #12-13, which are in the next volume), Star Wars: The Jabba Tape, Star Wars: Boba Fett – Twin Engines Of Destruction; and material from Star Wars Tales #1, 3-5, 10, 14-15, 20 & 22.
title: Star Wars Legends Epic Collection: The New Republic Vol. 1
